name: server-monitoring-backend
description: 1. Create project `.env` file into the project root directory. You can use the following parameters in your `.env` file as a default. ``` development_mode=true backend_port=4000 mongo_db_connection_string="mongodb+srv://developer:water123@testing.qtetx.mongodb.net/dev-ticketing" telegram_channel="-808854602" telegram_token="5940612440:AAGqWjkK3XyLYcuFXwvO7zu1zZxplTLEbVk" ``` 2. Make sure `node` is intalled with atleast Version 12. Once you know it's properly installed run `npm install`. 3. Install `nodemon` globally if you haven't installed. You can install using this command `npm install -g nodemon`. 4. Run the project by going into the project root directory and running the command `nodemon`.
author: Guillermo Tabligan
